introDialog.text: I'm a he/him, born on September 12, 2004...
Bro ..... can you just read it?? I ain't saying allat

dialog.text: My name is Jezreel Pimentel.
You can call me Jez or Etlil
Nice to meet you!
Yeah, I don't know why i put ts
But it tells me that I'm a male.
I was born on September 12, 2004.
My zodiac sign is Virgo.
I don't really care about astrology tho, I just want to put it in here.
Is this really necessary?
I live in Aurora, Philippines.
This is also my birthplace.
I am an INTJ according to the MBTI.
MBTI(Myers-Briggs Type Indicator) is about self-report questionnaire that categorizes individual into different personality types blah blah blah...
I ain't saying allat, just search it up in the web bro
Btw my type is INTJ which means I'm a strategic type of shi...
Who value logic and efficiency and some shi
Yeah gaming is my favorite hobby. Btw here's my top 5 games out there
Isn't obvious? I freaking love this game.
This game is a 2d turnbased RPG, it's a game about friendship and adventure.
But in the ending it turns out that there is more than adventure,
And its also a lot of horror and psychological shi going on in this game.
And after I finished it kinda change my life.
Like forgiving yourself or some shi.
This game is also a part of my character development.
It's a 2D turn-based RPG again and it have a trash graphics.
But despite that it also has some emotional scenes that can hit you in the feelings.
And also this game has a lot of different endings depending on your choices.
I think the total endings for this game is 93 endings with 3 main endings
And the story is really good and the characters are really lovable.
I love this game because it's so emotional.
And also for It's Philippine representation.
UYYYY PILIPINS!!! RAHHHHH
Btw I love this game because the story is really good and the art style is really nice.
And the scenes relates to me in some ways.
Maybe because I'm a Filipino, you know?
But this game teaches me about how to value friendships.
I love this game for it's difficulty and it's adventurous gameplay.
This game is a 2D metroidvania game with a really nice art style.
It's my also inspiration for creating a game(that I will create soon)
I remember putting a hundred of hours into this game and it was worth it.
Yeah, about this game....this is a complete trash game.
I just can't quit it because I invested so much time and money into it.
I played this game for around 7 years and I peaked Mythical Immortal rank in this game.
Btw, My main hero is Joy with 1k+ and 67% win rate.
But I kinda value this game because of the memories and friendships I made in this game.
So I still cherish it while I can still play it.
I really love music, I just need some music whatever I'm doing.
I also want to learn some instrument soon, and produce some tracks,
But for now, I just listen to music for inspiration.
So here's my favorite artist out there. NOTE: ITS NOT A RANKING
I love the vibe of his musics it fits the RPG genre thingy.
He also inspire me to create my own music.
Because his games are using the same music that he produces
And despite that, it turns out pretty great.
My favorite music produced by him is 'His Theme'.
I love this artist for his emotional and soulful type of music.
His music really hits me in the feelings.
I also love to sing along together with his songs.
My favorite music produced by him is 'TAKE ALL THE LOVE'.
I love her voice and the way she delivers her songs.
Her music is really relaxing and it helps me to calm down whenever I'm stressed.
And sometimes I just listen to her music to sleep like it's a lullaby.
My favorite music produced by her is 'Let you Break My Heart Again'.
Philippines Represent nanaman!!! RAHHHHHH
Kidding aside... I just love the band and their songs.
They're the top 1 band in my taste in music
My favorite music produced by them is 'Dulo ng Hangganan'.
I love their songs even I don't understand the meaning of the lyrics...
Their music is really catchy and it has a really nice beat.
I also love the way they deliver their songs.
My favorite music produced by them is 'Tracing that Dream'.
Art is just a side hobby of mine.
I'm just a casual artist, and creating an artwork when I'm bored
I just know how to draw digitally and a graphite pencil.
I also want to learn how to paint with acrylic and watercolor soon.
But for now, I just draw some fanarts of my favorite games and shows.
And some concept arts for my future games.
I'm more into anime than live actions, that's why most of it are anime.
I love this shows for it's uniqueness, unique power system, unique storylines, and unique artstyle.
This show is really iconic and it has a really big fandom.
My favorite part of this show is Part 5: Golden Wind.
I really like this show for its storytelling and character development.
Even I don't read the manga, I know for myself that this is one of the best anime out there.
It's not about the fighting but It's about empathetic storytelling.
This show also kinda change my perspective about life.
I really like this series for its unique take on the character and the storytelling.
I like the way Loki have his redemption arc from being a villain to being a savior of multiverse
No Larp.
I'm really into this show for its iconic characters.
This anime is also a part of my childhood that's why I put it in here.
And I'm still waiting for the Blue Vortex anime release.
My final take is it's one of the best anime, and It's the best anime in past decade(2010-2020)
Despite of it being overrated, I love this show.
Because this show is a part of my college days.
Until now I still waiting weekly for the new episodes.
And everytime I see the iconic characters, my tears come down,
While saying 'I'm so glad I was born in this era to experience this shi'
Programming is both my hobby and career goal.
Maybe because I'm an IT student??
I also want to pursue this career path because I love this field.
For now, I'm just focusing on learning web development and game development.
And I'm willing to learn what the future holds for me.
I am currently studying at Northern Luzon Adventist College.
It's a private college located in the province of Pangasinan.
I am pursuing a degree in Information Technology there.

stats.label: COURSE
stats.value: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

dialog.text: I am pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology.
I chose this course because I have a strong interest in technology since I was young.
I also want to pursue a career in the IT industry, that's why I chose this course.
Yeah bro, you read it right.
I'm a 4.5th year student, Because I have a back subject that I need to repeat before graduating.
But I'm planning to graduate this year, hopefully.

stats.label: SUBJECTS
stats.value: Capstone 1 & 2, System Analysis & Design, Software Engineering, etc.

dialog.text: Some of the subjects I took includes Capstone 1 & 2, System Analysis & Design, and Software Engineering...
But I won't bore you with the details of each subjects, you can just ask me about it if you want.
I completed an internship at Northern Luzon Adventist Hospital.
It's a private hospital located in the province of Pangasinan.
During my internship, I worked on developing a Management Information System for the hospital.
This system is an all-in-one type of system that has features for patient management, appointment scheduling, inventory management, and more.
I also learned a lot about real-life software development during my internship.
I have worked on several projects throughout my studies.
I want to become a software engineer.

stats.label: DREAM
stats.value: I want to create an Indie Game

dialog.text: My dream is to create an indie game.

stats.label: IMPROVE
stats.value: I want to improve all of my skills.

dialog.text: I want to continuously improve my skills.

stats.label: LEARN
stats.value: Music Production, Game Design, Game Development, Programming

dialog.text: I want to learn more about music production, game design, game development, and programming.

stats.label: MINDSET
stats.value: Adapt, learn, and overcome any challenge

dialog.text: I believe in adapting, learning, and overcoming any challenge.
